---
title: "Strategic Analysis of ABP Ireland"
description: "A group project analysis focusing on ABP Ireland, an agricultural company, aiming to offer strategic advice for the company."
author: "Robert Mullins, Megan Walker, Laura Pietrzak, Sam Oates, Ross Sheridan, Emma Breton"
date: 2025-12-05
image: "placeholder.png"

categories: [Business Strategy]
---

## Overview

Placeholder

::: {.callout-note}
This project was completed as part of BAA1019 Business Strategy at DCU. 
:::

## Read the full report

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} Read Full Report](/projects/reports/company_analysis.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

<iframe src="/projects/reports/company_analysis.pdf" 
        width="100%" 
        height="800px"
        style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;">
</iframe>

---
